name: New England Creamy Clam Chowder
recipeIngredient: 4 slices of bacon or salt pork
2 cans (6 oz each) of minced clams with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan or skillet, cook the bacon or salt pork until brown and crisp. Drain on paper towels. Dice or crumble.
2. In the same skillet, sauté the chopped onion and diced potatoes for a couple of minutes. Sprinkle with flour.
3. Add clam juice from the cans and bottled clam juice. Stir to combine. Bring to a boil. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until the potatoes are soft, about 15 minutes.
4. Add half-and-half and season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Add minced clams. Heat until simmering. Do not boil. If using, add whipping cream. Sprinkle with chopped parsley or diced bacon or pork. Serve immediately.
